# Refactor .NET 8 Console Calculator with Angular UI

Please refactor the .NET 8 console calculator application by adding an Angular UI frontend while maintaining existing console project and testing functionality. The UI must resemble a physical calculator device and keypad. Make the appearance appealing with colored keys and maintain a calculation history window to the side, external to the calculator UI.

Ensure the Angular project is properly integrated into the existing solution structure located at `$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/src/create-dotnet-calculator/`. Update all necessary configuration files, including but not limited to `angular.json`, `package.json`, and `.csproj` files to support building and running the Angular frontend alongside the .NET backend.
